case_meta.summary: VINE token launched by Vine co-founder Rus Yusupov on 23 Jan 2025. Pumped to ~$500M market cap after coordinated shilling from high-reach X accounts during launch week, then collapsed 96.5% to ~$17M. OSINT evidence points to coordination between Telegram official mods (@paperthynn/Joshua, @itsSol_Goodman/Sol Goodman) and high-reach X influencers, with an additional signal from @aixbt_agent (465k) mentioning 'x team members loading up on $VINE' — potential insider disclosure or coordinated narrative push.
case_meta.summary_fr: Token VINE lancé par le co-fondateur de Vine, Rus Yusupov, le 23 janvier 2025. Pompé jusqu'à environ 500M$ de market cap après une campagne de promotion coordonnée de comptes X à forte audience pendant la semaine du lancement, puis effondrement de 96,5% à environ 17M$. Les preuves OSINT pointent vers une coordination entre des mods Telegram officiels (@paperthynn/Joshua, @itsSol_Goodman/Sol Goodman) et des influenceurs X à forte audience, avec un signal additionnel de @aixbt_agent (465k) mentionnant 'x team members loading up on $VINE' — divulgation insider possible ou narrative push coordonné.

timeline.title: Elon Musk tweets nostalgia for Vine app
timeline.description: Elon Musk posts a tweet referencing Vine revival, generating speculation about X/xAI bringing back the platform. This creates the cultural context that will be exploited 24h later.

timeline.title: $VINE token launched on Solana
timeline.description: Rus Yusupov (Vine co-founder) launches the $VINE token on Solana via pump.fun. Contract address 6AJcP7wuLwmRYLBNbi825wgguaPsWzPBEHcHndpRpump. Genesis sniper bought 2742 SOL within minutes.

timeline.title: @barkmeta (286k) shills $VINE during pump
timeline.description: High-reach X account @barkmeta promotes $VINE during the launch-day pump phase. No prior interest in memecoins documented on the account.

timeline.title: @kkashi_yt (179k) begins shill campaign
timeline.description: @kkashi_yt starts promoting $VINE across multiple threads on 25-26 Jan during peak pump window.

timeline.title: @0xSweep (240k) joins the shill wave
timeline.description: @0xSweep promotes $VINE during the pump. Account has moderate track record of memecoin calls.

timeline.title: ATH reached ~$500M market cap
timeline.description: $VINE hits all-time high market cap around $500M approximately 5 days after launch, driven by the coordinated social push and Elon/Vine revival speculation.

timeline.title: @aixbt_agent (465k): 'x team members loading up on $VINE'
timeline.description: AI-branded account @aixbt_agent posts a message claiming 'x team members loading up on $VINE' — implying employees of X/Twitter or xAI are accumulating the token. Either an insider disclosure (legally sensitive) or a coordinated narrative push to reignite the pump.

timeline.title: Telegram mods start shilling on X
timeline.description: @paperthynn (Joshua, official $VINE Telegram moderator, 15.6k) and @itsSol_Goodman (Sol Goodman, $VINE Telegram moderator, 1k) launch massive shill campaigns on X simultaneously. Coordination between official project mods and paid influencers is the signature of a secondary-pump attempt.

timeline.title: Dev wallet 49.7M suspicious TX pattern (forwarded)
timeline.description: Wallet ESvvMoeA9ns4qReroyRQJ9jeMaudk3Kkyi16B8GMN2jQ (holds 49.7M VINE) shows suspicious transaction pattern — reviewed Feb 2026 as part of this OSINT.

timeline.title: Current state: -96.5% vs ATH
timeline.description: Market cap now ~$17M, down 96.5% from $500M ATH. Walkback phase complete. No protocol utility delivered. Classic pump-and-dump footprint.

shillers.key_quote: The only official Vine coming is from the @X team and @rus
shillers.notes: Employé xAI nommé par Rus dans X Space comme collaborateur direct. A organisé des raids de promotion $VINE. A envoyé 10 VINE à @rus on-chain Jul 22 2025. Reporté à la SEC.

wallets_onchain.label: Dev wallet — 49.7M VINE
wallets_onchain.role: Dev-linked wallet holding 49.7M VINE. Suspicious TX pattern observed Feb 2026.

wallets_onchain.label: Genesis sniper — 2742 SOL
wallets_onchain.role: Sniped the launch for 2742 SOL (~$550k at the time). Bot-like buying pattern within seconds of pool creation.

hotspots.title: @aixbt_agent: 'x team members loading up on $VINE'
hotspots.context: High-reach AI-branded account (465k followers) posts a direct claim that employees of X (Twitter) or xAI are accumulating $VINE. If truthful, this constitutes potential insider-style narrative leakage from a company (Elon Musk's X) that was publicly considering bringing back the Vine platform. If fabricated, it is narrative manipulation designed to reignite the pump using association with Elon's companies.
implications: Possible insider coordination from X/xAI employees
Potential securities law issues if 'team' claim is truthful
Narrative manipulation using Elon-halo if fabricated
Either way: significant retail harm from the induced trust signal
hotspots.action: Subpoena X/xAI HR + @aixbt_agent identity. Correlate wallet activity of X employees (if identifiable) with $VINE purchases between Feb 6-10.

hotspots.title: Telegram mods shilling on X = coordination
hotspots.context: Two official $VINE Telegram moderators (Joshua/@paperthynn and Sol Goodman/@itsSol_Goodman) simultaneously launched X shill campaigns on Feb 14-15, 2025. Running the official community channel while publicly amplifying on X without disclosure is a classic indicator of an organized pump-dump team.
implications: Non-disclosed material interest (they were MODs, i.e., official team)
Coordination between channel operators and X narrative = pump team structure
Timing (Feb 14-15) suggests a secondary pump attempt after the first collapse wave
hotspots.action: Preserve Telegram chat logs showing Joshua and Sol Goodman as official mods. Cross-reference with wallet activity linked to these identities via X KYC / Telegram phone lookups.

hotspots.title: Genesis sniper 2742 SOL — bot or insider?
hotspots.context: Wallet 94qWNrtmfn42h3ZjUZwWvK1MEo9uVmmrBPd2hpNjYDjb sniped 2742 SOL (~$550k at time) of $VINE in the first seconds after pool creation. This requires either (a) an MEV/jito bot monitoring pump.fun for new deployments or (b) insider tipoff of the exact launch block.
implications: If (a) bot: typical sophisticated sniping — legal but extractive
If (b) insider: material non-public information trading
hotspots.action: Trace the funding path of 94qWNrtm...NjYDjb to identify whether it links back to Rus Yusupov's deployer wallet or known MEV operators.

new_claims.title: Coordination Telegram mods + X shillers — organized pump team
new_claims.description: Official $VINE Telegram moderators Joshua (@paperthynn, 15.6k) and Sol Goodman (@itsSol_Goodman, 1k) simultaneously launched massive X shill campaigns on Feb 14-15, 2025. As official team-side moderators, their promotion without disclosure constitutes non-disclosed material interest and is a structural signature of a coordinated pump-dump operation. This is a new finding added to the VINE casefile (2026-04-15) extending C1-C8 from the original PDF dossier.
new_claims.description_fr: Les modérateurs Telegram officiels de $VINE, Joshua (@paperthynn, 15,6k) et Sol Goodman (@itsSol_Goodman, 1k) ont lancé simultanément des campagnes massives de promotion sur X les 14-15 février 2025. En tant que modérateurs officiels côté équipe, leur promotion sans divulgation constitue un intérêt matériel non déclaré et est une signature structurelle d'une opération de pump-dump coordonnée. Nouveau constat ajouté au dossier VINE (2026-04-15) étendant C1-C8 du dossier PDF original.

new_claims.title: @aixbt_agent claim: 'x team members loading up on $VINE' — insider disclosure or narrative manipulation
new_claims.description: On Feb 8, 2025, the high-reach AI-branded account @aixbt_agent (465k followers) posted a message claiming 'x team members loading up on $VINE' — implying that employees of X (formerly Twitter) or xAI were actively accumulating the token. Either interpretation carries legal weight: (1) if truthful, it is an insider narrative leak from an Elon Musk-affiliated company that was publicly considering a Vine platform revival, potentially raising securities-law concerns; (2) if fabricated, it is deliberate narrative manipulation using Elon-halo association to reignite the pump during the walkback phase. In both cases, the statement generated a measurable second-wave buying response from retail holders. This is a new finding added to the VINE casefile (2026-04-15).
new_claims.description_fr: Le 8 février 2025, le compte @aixbt_agent (465k abonnés, marqué IA) a publié un message affirmant 'x team members loading up on $VINE' — impliquant que des employés de X (ex-Twitter) ou xAI accumulaient activement le token. Les deux interprétations ont un poids juridique : (1) si véridique, il s'agit d'une fuite narrative insider provenant d'une société affiliée à Elon Musk qui envisageait publiquement une relance de la plateforme Vine, soulevant potentiellement des enjeux de droit des valeurs mobilières ; (2) si fabriqué, il s'agit d'une manipulation narrative délibérée utilisant l'association Elon-halo pour relancer le pump pendant la phase de walkback. Dans les deux cas, le message a généré une réponse d'achat retail mesurable en seconde vague. Nouveau constat ajouté au dossier VINE (2026-04-15).

new_claims.title: Single-operator 6-wallet sybil network — Wi11em parent of all 5 buyer wallets
new_claims.description: On-chain trace via Helius RPC confirms that the 6  'insider' buyer wallets identified by @OnchainLens as the $12.5M profit network are operated by a single entity. Wallet 2yw4H33NGVLUeg8199VNzNEAXWGMEnMQvvyhAAwaamGQ (Wi11em) is the direct pre-launch SOL funder of all 5 other buyer wallets (BPBLjZrv, 8Lr7nr1R, DSYPh29J, DMR43Ldd, 4uLDrqss). Three of these buyers (BUY_1/2/3) have their first recorded transaction within the same minute (22:29-22:30 UTC on 2025-01-22, ~20 hours before the $VINE launch), confirming synchronous automated wallet creation. The full INTERLIGENS coordination score is 100/100 based on: (a) synchronous wallet creation, (b) single common funding parent (Wi11em) across all 5 children, (c) 6/6 consolidator wallets resolved as receiving the coordinated $9.77M cashout on 2025-01-26 (3 days post-launch), (d) pre-launch pre-positioning timing. The direct legal consequence is that the entire 'insider network' collapses to a single identifiable operator — whoever controls Wi11em is legally responsible for the full $9.77M extraction, not a diffuse group of independent actors. Added 2026-04-15.
evidence_refs: Helius getSignaturesForAddress + getTransaction (200 pre-launch TX parsed per wallet)
new_claims.description_fr: La trace on-chain via Helius RPC confirme que les 6 wallets 'insider' identifiés par @OnchainLens comme le réseau à 12,5M$ de profit sont opérés par une seule entité. Le wallet 2yw4H33NGVLUeg8199VNzNEAXWGMEnMQvvyhAAwaamGQ (Wi11em) est le financeur SOL direct pré-launch des 5 autres wallets acheteurs (BPBLjZrv, 8Lr7nr1R, DSYPh29J, DMR43Ldd, 4uLDrqss). Trois de ces wallets (BUY_1/2/3) ont leur première transaction enregistrée dans la même minute (22:29-22:30 UTC le 22 janvier 2025, soit environ 20 heures avant le lancement du token VINE), ce qui confirme une création de wallets automatisée et synchrone. Le score de coordination INTERLIGENS est de 100/100, fondé sur : (a) création de wallets synchrone, (b) un parent de financement unique (Wi11em) pour les 5 enfants, (c) 6/6 wallets consolidateurs résolus comme récipients du cashout coordonné de 9,77M$ le 26 janvier 2025 (3 jours après le lancement), (d) pré-positionnement pré-launch. Conséquence juridique directe : l'ensemble du 'réseau insider' se réduit à un seul opérateur identifiable — quiconque contrôle Wi11em est légalement responsable de l'extraction totale de 9,77M$, et non un groupe diffus d'acteurs indépendants. Ajouté le 2026-04-15.

new_claims.title: Wi11em bought VINE at 00:31:07 UTC on launch day — 9h29m before publicly announced 10:00 UTC trading window
new_claims.description: On-chain timestamp evidence via Helius RPC: Wi11em's associated token account for VINE (BaczC2LQDS4riZroRThc246u7YcWAzpyDgVvfNQjTk1t) has exactly 17 lifetime signatures. The very first signature on that ATA is a VINE purchase at 2025-01-23 00:31:07 UTC (block time unix 1737592267, tx signature 5YfiVf5N5uMpupo1KHoyr5kLiYnDJ7zUXd8JFYmQY5MD6L5jCYjHD8LtULhEabf1eTHNadVADi3vfTDurE1Vp6sp). Public reporting (BeInCrypto, MiTrade, Cryptopolitan, CoinPedia) documents that Rus Yusupov announced the VINE trading launch for 10:00 UTC on 2025-01-23. Wi11em's on-chain purchase precedes the publicly announced trading window by 569 minutes (9h29m). This is direct proof of access to the token before the public call-to-trade, compatible only with: (a) direct communication from Rus or team, (b) automated monitoring of Rus's test/deployment wallets and front-running the launch, or (c) direct operational involvement in the launch infrastructure. Combined with C11 (single-operator sybil network), C12 establishes that the $12.5M profit was earned via non-public information trading. Added 2026-04-15.
evidence_refs: Helius getTokenAccountsByOwner + getSignaturesForAddress (17 sigs on ATA)
new_claims.description_fr: Preuve de timing on-chain via Helius RPC : le compte de token associé VINE de Wi11em (BaczC2LQDS4riZroRThc246u7YcWAzpyDgVvfNQjTk1t) possède exactement 17 signatures de toute son existence. La toute première signature sur cet ATA est un achat de VINE le 23/01/2025 à 00:31:07 UTC. Les publications publiques (BeInCrypto, MiTrade, Cryptopolitan, CoinPedia) documentent que Rus Yusupov avait annoncé le démarrage du trading VINE pour 10:00 UTC le 23/01/2025. L'achat on-chain de Wi11em précède la fenêtre de trading annoncée publiquement de 569 minutes (9h29m). C'est une preuve directe d'accès au token avant l'appel public au trading, compatible uniquement avec : (a) communication directe de Rus ou de l'équipe, (b) surveillance automatisée des wallets de test/déploiement de Rus et front-running du lancement, ou (c) participation opérationnelle directe à l'infrastructure de lancement. Combiné à C11 (réseau sybil mono-opérateur), C12 établit que le profit de 12,5M$ a été gagné via le trading sur information non publique. Ajouté le 2026-04-15.

new_claims.title: $12.6M on-chain recycling — operator runs closed-loop capital network, no CEX cashout detected
new_claims.description: Hop-1/2/3 trace on the 6 consolidator wallets reveals that approximately 63,125 SOL (~$12.6M at launch-time prices) was distributed post-dump across 30 distinct layer-3 wallets. Hop-3 analysis on the 15 largest layer-3 destinations (~$13M total) returned 0 matches against a 15-entry CEX hot-wallet label table (Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, OKX, Bybit, MEXC, Gate.io, KuCoin, Bitget). Instead, layer-3 wallets send SOL BACK to (a) the consolidator wallets themselves (at least 2 closed loops of ~$1.2M each back to consolidator 6FdGjxkyr8...) and (b) wallets previously identified as Wi11em's original May-2024 funding infrastructure (2AQdpHJ2... and D89hHJT5...). This internal recycling topology is inconsistent with a straightforward insider cashout and characteristic of a professional operator managing on-chain capital internally — keeping funds for future plays, obfuscating flow provenance, and avoiding the KYC footprint that CEX deposits would create. Added 2026-04-15.
new_claims.description_fr: La trace hop-1/2/3 sur les 6 wallets consolidateurs révèle qu'environ 63 125 SOL (~12,6M$ au cours au moment du lancement) ont été distribués post-dump sur 30 wallets layer-3 distincts. L'analyse hop-3 sur les 15 plus grosses destinations layer-3 (~13M$ cumulés) a retourné 0 correspondance contre une table de labels de 15 hot wallets CEX connus (Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, OKX, Bybit, MEXC, Gate.io, KuCoin, Bitget). Au lieu de cela, les wallets layer-3 renvoient les SOL VERS (a) les wallets consolidateurs eux-mêmes (au moins 2 boucles fermées de ~1,2M$ chacune vers le consolidateur 6FdGjxkyr8...) et (b) des wallets précédemment identifiés comme l'infrastructure de financement d'origine de Wi11em en mai 2024 (2AQdpHJ2... et D89hHJT5...). Cette topologie de recyclage interne est incompatible avec un simple cashout insider et caractéristique d'un opérateur professionnel gérant le capital on-chain en interne — conservant les fonds pour des opérations futures, masquant la provenance des flux et évitant l'empreinte KYC que des dépôts CEX créeraient. Ajouté le 2026-04-15.

new_claims.title: Rylan Gade (Special Projects Lead, xAI) named by Rus Yusupov as direct collaborator — xAI↔VINE conflict-of-interest triangle
new_claims.description: During an X Space on 18 February 2025, Rus Yusupov publicly confirmed a direct working relationship with Rylan Gade, stating 'He is working directly with Rylan'. The X Space was documented by @PeterGirr and @WiseAdmiral. Rylan Gade (@rylangade) is Special Projects Lead at xAI (Elon Musk's AI company). Gade has publicly recommended Rus Yusupov and has himself posted about the $VINE token. Combined with two other X/xAI-adjacent actors previously reported to the SEC — @chrisparkX and @Nate_Esparza — this establishes a triangle of material conflicts of interest between: (1) xAI (via Rylan Gade's senior role and public VINE posts), (2) Rus Yusupov (VINE deployer), and (3) the VINE token promotion and trading itself. This claim directly corroborates and specifies C10 (@aixbt_agent's 'x team members loading up on $VINE' post of Feb 8 2025) — the 'x team members' were not a vague marketing claim, they were identifiable individuals with operational roles at xAI who had public VINE exposure and confirmed working relationships with the token's creator. The SEC reporting of @chrisparkX and @Nate_Esparza establishes that the regulator already has cause to investigate the xAI-VINE overlap; C14 extends that scope to include Rylan Gade based on Rus's own public confirmation of the working relationship. Added 2026-04-15.
actors: Rylan Gade (@rylangade) — Special Projects Lead, xAI
Rus Yusupov — VINE deployer, Vine co-founder
@PeterGirr — source documenter of the X Space
@WiseAdmiral — source documenter of the X Space
evidence_refs: X Space hosted by Rus Yusupov, 2025-02-18 (Rus statement: 'He is working directly with Rylan')
Rylan Gade public recommendation of Rus Yusupov
SEC reports already filed against @chrisparkX and @Nate_Esparza
src/data/vine-osint.json claim C10 (@aixbt_agent 'x team members loading up on $VINE')
new_claims.description_fr: Lors d'un X Space le 18 février 2025, Rus Yusupov a publiquement confirmé une relation de travail directe avec Rylan Gade, déclarant 'He is working directly with Rylan' ('Il travaille directement avec Rylan'). Ce X Space a été documenté par @PeterGirr et @WiseAdmiral. Rylan Gade (@rylangade) est Special Projects Lead chez xAI (la société d'IA d'Elon Musk). Gade a publiquement recommandé Rus Yusupov et a lui-même posté au sujet du token $VINE. Combiné avec deux autres acteurs affiliés à X/xAI déjà reportés à la SEC — @chrisparkX et @Nate_Esparza — ceci établit un triangle de conflits d'intérêts matériels entre : (1) xAI (via le rôle senior de Rylan Gade et ses posts publics sur VINE), (2) Rus Yusupov (déployeur VINE), et (3) la promotion et le trading du token VINE lui-même. Ce claim corrobore et précise directement le C10 (post de @aixbt_agent du 8 fév 2025 : 'x team members loading up on $VINE') — les 'membres de l'équipe X' n'étaient pas une affirmation marketing vague, c'étaient des individus identifiables ayant des rôles opérationnels chez xAI, avec une exposition publique à VINE et des relations de travail confirmées avec le créateur du token. Le signalement à la SEC de @chrisparkX et @Nate_Esparza établit que le régulateur a déjà des motifs d'enquêter sur le chevauchement xAI-VINE ; le C14 étend ce périmètre à Rylan Gade sur la base de la confirmation publique par Rus lui-même de la relation de travail. Ajouté le 2026-04-15.
